title: This may be OnePlus' final week
description: The writing has been on the wall for months, but this week may finally bring the moment of truth. If the latest rumors prove accurate, OnePlus could be about to shut down its global operations, bringing one of Android's most recognizable brands to an abrupt end. OnePlus started off as an independent brand. Then, in the past few years, Oppo's influence over it grew from an open secret for those in the know to a very obvious fact. OnePlus' transition into oblivion may be finalized later this week, according to a new report from a usually reliable source. Oppo and OnePlus are allegedly...

title: New Google Pixel 11 renders show it in three colors
description: Google is announcing the Pixel 11 family on August 12, and we've already seen the Pixel 11 in CAD-based renders a while back. Now, three new renders have surfaced seemingly depicting the device in three different colors. These have been found on Amazon as part of listings that appear to be placeholders or drafts for the upcoming device. The listings in question are sold and shipped by Amazon itself and show as part of the Google Store on the platform. Google Pixel 11 renders However, the names of these colors don't quite match what has been leaked so far. They are called...

title: European Commission plans to limit children's access to social media
description: The European Commission will propose new rules limiting children's access to social media across the EU later this year, per Commission President Ursula von der Leyen. The move follows recommendations from an expert panel tasked with finding ways to better protect minors from online harms. Under the recommendations, children under 13 would only be allowed limited, supervised access to social media. Restrictions would gradually ease as they get older, however. The panel also called for platforms to prove they're safe for young users before granting access, shifting more responsibility...

title: An unlikely Chinese company claims they have the first "AI Agentic Phone"
description: A Chinese company you may have never heard of has just announced that it's making a smartphone - or at least sourcing one from an ODM. But wait, this is no regular smartphone; it's the world's first AI agentic phone. And guess what, it's being hyped before OpenAI got a chance to hype up its own rumored smartphone. The company in question is called StepFun - it was founded in 2023 by former Microsoft employees in Shanghai, and the phone they are teasing today is called the StepX Neo. StepFun is no stranger to on-device AI, but they've so far provided service integrations to manufacturers...

title: Omdia: smartphone market shipments fell in Q2, but Samsung and Apple grew their market shares
description: According to a new report by Omdia, global smartphone shipments fell 4% in the second quarter of this year (April-June) compared to the same period last year. Obviously, the ongoing memory crisis is to blame, pushing up component costs and making devices more expensive. However, both Samsung and Apple managed to grow their market shares - the former from 20% to 22%, and the latter from 16% to 20%. Meanwhile, Xiaomi's market share fell from 15% to 11%, Oppo's from 12% to 10%, and vivo's from 9% to 8%. As you can see, Samsung still leads the pack and Apple is now a close second....

title: Google Pixel 11 devices to have the first 2nm smartphone SoC, new modem
description: According to a new report from China, Google's Tensor G6 chipset that will be in the Pixel 11 series will be the first smartphone chip to use TSMC’s 2nm process, beating Qualcomm and its Snapdragon 8 Elite Gen 6, MediaTek's Dimensity 9600, and Apple's A20 Pro to the punch. This makes sense as those three SoCs are only expected to be inside devices that are going to be announced in September, while Google has already confirmed that it's unveiling the Pixel 11 family on August 12. An FCC filing for the Pixel 11 Pro Fold has revealed what has been rumored in the past, namely that...

title: Samsung is allegedly increasing smartphone repair prices in South Korea
description: Rising component prices forced Samsung to increase the prices of some of its phones in several regions. But the effects of the current market conditions reach further than that – repair costs are going up as well. In its home country of South Korea, Samsung has raised the price of repair materials for smartphones by an average of 5%, reports The Chosun. Other segments are affected as well – e.g. materials for home appliance repair now cost 9% more on average. To put this in monetary terms, the average smartphone repair job became KRW 11,000 more expensive – this converts to $7.37 /...

title: Samsung Galaxy Watch9 and Watch Ultra2 to arrive with new chipsets, bigger batteries
description: We are less than two weeks away from Samsung's next Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22, when we expect to see not just the new Galaxy foldables, but the next-generation Galaxy Watches, too. And we've already seen quite a few leaks in the past few weeks, so we have a good idea of what to expect from the upcoming Galaxy Watch9 and Watch Ultra2. However, while the previous reports were mostly about looks and straps, the one coming from WinFuture talks about the hardware, and judging by the hardware upgrades, they may be used to justify the sudden price hike. The most notable change with...

title: Leaked video shows off Samsung Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra's crease-less display
description: Update: Ice Universe is convinced that the video actually shows a Galaxy Z Fold7 and not the Z Fold8 Ultra. Among other clues, Ice points out that the Z Fold8 generation is supposed to introduce an anti-reflective film and the device in the video is showing a lot of reflections. Also, the punch hole for the selfie camera is bigger than it is supposed to be - this is something that Ice has been keeping a close eye on. At CES, Samsung showcased a foldable display with no visible crease. We all knew this was a teaser for the upcoming Galaxy Z Fold8 Ultra and now we have proof – someone from...

title: Additional Redmi Note 17 details leak including chipset, charging speed and IP rating
description: Xiaomi recently revealed that the Redmi Note 17 will have a 7” screen – once upon a time this would have been a tablet, not a phone. The company also confirmed that the phone will have an 8,000mAh battery, which isn’t small, but it is smaller than the 9,000mAh battery of the Redmi Note 17 Pro. Display card with Redmi Note 17 details Someone took a photo of a display card (shared by Android Treasure) – this card revealed some additional details. For starters, the phone will support 45W wired charging and 22.5W reverse charging. For comparison, the Pro model will do 67W...

title: Leak suggests Galaxy Z Flip8 will be lighter than the Z Flip7
description: Samsung is expected to unveil the Galaxy Z Fold8 series and the Galaxy Z Flip8 at its Galaxy Unpacked event on July 22. Ahead of the launch, a new leak has revealed new details about the Galaxy Z Flip8’s weight and thickness. According to tipster Ice Universe, the Galaxy Z Flip8 will weigh around 180 grams, making it 8 grams lighter than the Galaxy Z Flip7, which weighs 188 grams. Leaked Galaxy Z Flip8 render While the difference may seem minor on paper, the reduced weight could make the Galaxy Z Flip8 feel more comfortable to use. The tipster also reiterated that the Galaxy Z...

title: Motorola Edge 70 Max hands-on video surfaces ahead of launch
description: Just two days ahead of its official launch, a hands-on video of the Motorola Edge 70 Max has surfaced online offering a closer look at its design from every angle. Meanwhile, a new set of official-looking renders has also leaked, revealing the phone in all of its color options. The hands-on video reveals that the Motorola Edge 70 Max will feature a 50MP Sony LYTIA primary rear camera with optical image stabilization (OIS). Here's the good look at the Motorola Edge 70 Max.#Motorola #MotorolaEdge70Max pic.twitter.com/ZWghNsXvl9— Anvin (@ZionsAnvin) July 12, 2026 Motorola has already...

title: Insta360 X6 leak reveals smaller design, pricing
description: The Insta360 X6 appears to be nearing its official debut. Ahead of the expected launch, WinFuture's Roland Quandt has shared the action camera's marketing images, key specifications, and expected European pricing. The leaked marketing images suggest that the Insta360 X6 will arrive with a noticeably more compact design, although its overall look remains largely in line with the Insta360 X5. Like its predecessor, the camera features a fisheye lens on both the front and the back. The display now sits directly below the rear camera, while the power and record buttons, as well as the...

title: Google Pixel 11 Pro Fold leaks in new Pine shade
description: Google is expected to unveil the Pixel 11 Pro Fold alongside the rest of the Pixel 11 lineup at its Made by Google event on August 12. Ahead of the launch, a new leak has surfaced, giving us a look at the foldable in a new color option. The latest leak, courtesy of Mystic Leaks, gives us a look at the Pixel 11 Pro Fold in a new Pine colorway, which appears to be a light shade of green. The image also gives us another look at the phone's light gold frame and redesigned rear camera module. The camera cutouts now house both the LED flash and the microphone. Earlier leaked renders...

title: Deals: iPhone 17 Pro Max gets a price cut, Nothing Phone (4b) up for pre-order
description: Apple's iPhone 17 Pro Max and the iPhone 17e are on sale this week. Meanwhile, Nothing's newly unveiled Phone (4b) is now up for pre-order. Rounding out this week's deals are a couple of Google's Pixel phones, Xiaomi's 17 series, and the Samsung Galaxy A57. The Nothing Phone (4b) marks the UK brand's first "b" series phone. While there are no launch discounts on offer, the handset is now available for pre-order, with deliveries scheduled to begin on July 16. Nothing Phone (4b) pre-order coming July 16 ...

title: Nothing Phone (4b) official, Pixel 11 series prices leak, Week 28 in review
description: Welcome to your week's recap. Nothing dropped the Phone (4b) - cheaper, yet retaining Nothing's core specs - a Glyph Bar (but simplified), a big 6.77-inch 120Hz AMOLED display, a 5,200mAh battery, and a 50MP stabilized main camera. The phone starts at €329 and it's on pre-order. The vivo V80 series is reportedly launching next month with larger 7,200mAh batteries, Snapdragon 7 Gen 4 for the standard V80, ZEISS-branded cameras, and 90W charging. Pricing is expected to stay in line with the current V70 lineup. A fresh leak detailed the entire Pixel 11 lineup's European pricing, with all...

title: Weekly poll: will you buy the Nothing Phone (4b)?
description: Nothing is narrowing its scope – in January, it announced that it won’t release a flagship in 2026 and last month it canceled the CMF Phone 3 Pro. This only leaves the (4a) phones and now a (4b) model too, a new mid-ranger that was announced earlier this week. The Nothing Phone (4b) is a bit cheaper than the Nothing Phone (4a) but not as cheap as the Nothing Phone (3a) Lite (is the (4a) Lite canceled too?). Here is a quick price comparison for 8/128GB units. Note that there is an 8/256GB configuration of the (4b) available exclusively in India. Nothing Phone (3a) Lite ...

title: Weekly poll results: the Honor Magic V6 has many fans, but its price keeps others away
description: The Honor Magic V6 is available in Europe at a discounted price of €1,700/£1,500 until the end of the month. The EU price is set to go up to €2,300 in August and the UK price relies on a £500 voucher, which probably won’t last long. In either case, you get a free Honor Pad 10 and a 24-month screen protection plan. Even so, the price is turning some potential buyers away. In last week’s poll, two nearly equal groups formed – those who are interested in buying the Magic V6 at its current price accounted for 25.3% of the vote, while those who are looking for a discount first accounted for...

title: Motorola Edge 70 Max's battery details revealed
description: Motorola will unveil the Edge 70 Max on July 15, and it has already revealed the smartphone's design and confirmed the chip that will power it. Now, Indian online retailer Flipkart has revealed more details about the Motorola Edge 70 Max, including its battery capacity and charging speed. The Motorola Edge 70 Max will pack a 7,100 mAh battery with 90W wired charging and "category's only fast magnetic wireless charging." How fast? 25W. Additionally, Flipkart revealed that the Snapdragon 8 Gen 5-powered Motorola Edge 70 Max will have up to 12GB of LPDDR5X RAM onboard and an...

title: Deals: the Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is under $1,000, the Galaxy S26 and S26+ are also on sale
description: At the end of this month, Samsung’s attention will shift towards launching the new Galaxy Z foldables – you can already pre-reserve one here. We know that some of you don’t care for foldables, so let’s have a look at what’s going on with Samsung’s slab flagships. The Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra is under $1,000 yet again. This isn’t the lowest price we’ve seen for the 12/256GB model, but it’s within $50 or so. Unfortunately, the upgrade to 512GB storage is quite pricey at the moment. Amazon has the better deal on the 256GB variant and the same $1,300 price for the 512GB variant as Samsung.com,...
